_comment.name: MATT DTC Codes grabbed from Diagbox FDB. ECUTYPE union: MATT_C_2010, MATT_M_2010, MATT_P_2010. Conflicting labels resolved by majority vote across ECUTYPEs.

B1002.name: Fault internal to the instrument panel dot matrix display

B2E0C.name: Fault in the coherence of the navigator configuration

U1802.name: Vehicle speed information not valid fault

U1F03.name: Absence of communication with the BSI fault

U1F0F.name: Fault: ECU not communicating on the CAN
